topic: Requiem design vision / philosophy / the five pillars / why
core combat & resistance model, armor penetration FormIDs, the keyword chain
all-actor game-mechanics perks (armor pen, weight, arrow recovery, rescaling)
magic resistance cap (60/race, x3), elemental resist, absorb, wards
routing table — record signature → domain skill
skip / cosmetic records (visual auto-merge)
final integration checklist + run-through-the-Reqtificator
Reqtificator-handles-this vs needs-manual matrix (carry inputs not outputs)
what is patchable vs DLL/config (lockpicking, pricing, appearance)

vampire keyword 0A82BB + RFTI_Trait_Vampire AD3A44 / werewolf AD3A43
diseases — staged MGEF under a Touch ability spell, disease list FormIDs
exhaustion & stress — stamina attacks, armored casting, controller spells
stealth — sneak perks player-exclusive, lockpicking SKSE DLL, traps
alchemy — 4 ingredient effects must use REQ_Alch_* MGEFs, potions, poison rescaling
food & cooking — nutrition categories, stacking buffs, alcohol, economy
shouts — SHOU = 3 words → 3 spells + recovery, owned by Requiem.esp
standing stones / birthsigns — ConstantEffect ability spell, player-only
perks/skills/leveling — hook existing trees, player-exclusive perk FormIDs
economy — value ladders, round-to-5, record-driven vendor chests, no pricing config
